'''Paul Daly''' is an artist. He provided interior illustrations for several roleplaying game books from [[West End Games]].

==Contributions==
*''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]''
*''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
*''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''
*''[[Instant Adventures]]''
*[[Supernova (WEG)|''Supernova'']]
